summary: Documentation build job failed with exit code 1, but the actual error message is not included in the provided log context.

evidence.reason: Confirms job failure but does not specify the root cause
Indicates an error occurred, but error details are missing from the context

suggested_fix: Examine the full CI log to retrieve the actual error message that caused the documentation build to fail with exit code 1

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
